title: WBFG-Modpack made for friends
description: This modpack offers a variety of features, including Create mods, automation, Cobblemon, a world map, and more! Optimized for better FPS and smooth gameplay, it also includes Distant Horizons for breathtaking views. Perfect for playing with friends! =D
body:
This modpack offers a diverse range of features to enhance your gameplay experience, including Create mods for engineering and automation, an in-game currency system, Cobblemon for Pokémon-inspired fun, a detailed world map, and so much more!

With over 400 different dimensions to discover, you'll travel to wildly varied realms and uncover countless surprises. Mods that add custom-generated terrain and structures ensure you’ll explore unique, breathtaking landscapes brought to life with a stunning shader for immersive visuals. Plus, it’s designed with optimized performance in mind, ensuring smoother gameplay with better FPS and features like Distant Horizons for incredible far-off views without sacrificing performance.

The modpack is constantly being improved and expanded, with no plans to discontinue updates or enhancements.

It's the perfect choice for playing with friends, even if you all have different interests—there's something for everyone to enjoy. Dive in and start your adventure today!
